title: Junior SEO Specialist at Nivea India

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Nivea India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Nivea India in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nivea India:
Nivea India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nivea India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
